import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let text = match line
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      1
    end
    product = product * v
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
